intro: Government and technology sectors faced a concentrated wave of high-severity threats between April 12 and April 28, 2026, with Pro-Russia Hacktivists among the primary actors observed. The ten articles covering CISA-related activity included three critical and seven high-severity alerts, highlighting vulnerabilities such as CVE-2024-57726, CVE-2026-34197, CVE-2024-20662, and CVE-2024-21412. Affected sectors spanned government, technology, critical infrastructure, energy, and software development, while impacted regions included Global, United States, and North America.
